---
title: "ezRSA"
date: 2025-03-07 00:03:00
disableNunjucks: true
---
# ezRSA

# 一：题目类型

[[共模攻击]][[P8.已知P高位攻击]]

# 二：题目

```python
from gmpy2 import *
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from secret import flag

flag1=flag[:19]
flag2=flag[19:]
print(flag1)
print(flag2)
m=bytes_to_long(flag1)
p=getPrime(512)
q=getPrime(512)
n=p*q
print(f'n={n}')






c1=pow(m,e1,n)
c2=pow(m,e2,n)
c3=pow(m,e3,n)

print(f'c1={c1}')
print(f'c2={c2}')
print(f'c3={c3}')

m2=bytes_to_long(flag2)
r=getPrime(512)
s=getPrime(512)
higt_p=(r>>128)<<128
print(f'higt_p={higt_p}')
e4=68
n2=r*s
c4=pow(m2,e4,n2)
print(f'n2={n2}')
print(f'c4={c4}')

'''




higt_p=9321601176638691058715785514758729737545020601080397441265514942214195929601746961347795300229396415940730313409168447749129333621452957316555052358303744


'''
```

# 三：解题思路

前半段是共模攻击，其中需要注意互素问题，见e不互素。而e1和e3互素，所以用e1和e3的n进行共模攻击，得到前半段flag。
后半段是一个p高位泄露攻击：恢复p的低位后用coppersmith攻击得到后半段flag。

# 四：解题代码

```python
#flag1
from Crypto.Util.number import *
import gmpy2
import libnum



#




#



#共模攻击
#共模攻击函数
def rsa_gong_N_def(e1,e2,c1,c2,n):
    e1, e2, c1, c2, n=int(e1),int(e2),int(c1),int(c2),int(n)
    print("e1,e2:",e1,e2)
    print(gmpy2.gcd(e1,e2))
    s = gmpy2.gcdext(e1, e2)
    print(s)
    s1 = s[1]
    s2 = s[2]
    if s1 < 0:
        s1 = - s1
        c1 = gmpy2.invert(c1, n)
    elif s2 < 0:
        s2 = - s2
        c2 = gmpy2.invert(c2, n)
    m = (pow(c1,s1,n) * pow(c2 ,s2 ,n)) % n
    return int(m)
m = rsa_gong_N_def(e1,e2,c1,c2,n)
print(m)
print(libnum.n2s(int(m)).decode())
#flag{6574d5ff43449a

```

```python
#sage
import gmpy2

import libnum





  



higt_p=9321601176638691058715785514758729737545020601080397441265514942214195929601746961347795300229396415940730313409168447749129333621452957316555052358303744

  

p_fake = higt_p

  

pbits = p_fake.nbits()

kbits = 128  # p失去的低位

pbar = p_fake & (2 ^ pbits - 2 ^ kbits)

print("upper %d bits (of %d bits) is given" % (pbits - kbits, pbits))

  

PR.<x> = PolynomialRing(Zmod(n))

f = x + pbar

x0 = f.small_roots(X=2 ^ kbits, beta=0.4)[0]  # find root < 2^kbits with factor >= n^0.3

print(x0 + pbar)

  

p = 10496606133250924650973408422392393213195790115730683500477279237006896932591095256261821093956361110796894672841404976806452900489014635582796372762571837

q = n // p

e = 68

phi = (p-1) * (q-1)

  

d = gmpy2.invert(e // 4, phi)

m = pow(c, d, n)

'''



print(long_to_bytes(m))
```
